node.data: {"M8376":{"lit":"մխիթարեցան","line":{"facs":"#z104262211","resp":"#u2140","xml:id":"l104262211","n":"6"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"8376-137a"},"n":"մխիթարեցան"},"M36":{"lit":"մխիթարեցան","context":"text/body/ab[123]","n":"մխիթարեցան"},"M8375":{"lit":"մխիթա<lb xml:id=\"l104184421\" facs=\"#z104184421\" n=\"6\" resp=\"#u2140\" break=\"no\"/>րեցան","line":{"facs":"#z104184420","resp":"#u2140","break":"no","xml:id":"l104184420","n":"5"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"8375.0128"},"n":"մխիթարեցան"},"M7032":{"lit":"մխիթարեցան","line":{"facs":"#z104010262","resp":"#u2140","xml:id":"l104010262","n":"4"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"7032-095b"},"n":"մխիթարեցան"},"M695":{"lit":"մխիթարեցան","line":{"facs":"#z103929240","resp":"#u2140","break":"no","xml:id":"l103929240","n":"11"},"column":{"n":"3"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"695-382b"},"n":"մխիթարեցան"},"M9307":{"lit":"մ<lb xml:id=\"l104224878\" facs=\"#z104224878\" n=\"16\" resp=\"#u2140\" break=\"no\"/>խիթարեցան","line":{"facs":"#z104224877","resp":"#u2140","break":"no","xml:id":"l104224877","n":"15"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"9307-185a"},"n":"մխիթարեցան"}}
